urdu transliteration text:
Mai Shaam Chali BhaiyyaI am going to Shaam O BrotherEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Mai Shaam Chali bhaiyya, Zainab ko sula dena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am going to Shaam O Brother,
Please pray for me

urdu transliteration text:
Taskeen hamari ko, akbar ki pyari ko,Laazim nahi bistar ho, matti pe sula dena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Our little Sakina (a.s.), the beloved of Akbar,
If we don’t find a bed, we will put her to sleep on earth

urdu transliteration text:
Mai Shaam Chali bhaiyya, Zainab ko sula dena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am going to Shaam O Brother,
Please pray for me

urdu transliteration text:
Laashon pe wo aayenge, ghore be dorayenge,Masoom ali asgher ko, sene se laga lena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
They will come to the bodies of the martyrs and will even trample them with horses,
At that time hold innocent Ali Asgher close to your chest

urdu transliteration text:
Mai Shaam Chali bhaiyya, Zainab ko sula dena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am going to Shaam O Brother,
Please pray for me

urdu transliteration text:
Neze se utaari jo, chadar wo hamari haiJageer tumhari main, akbar ko bata daina
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The have taken our veils with the spears,
This hijab is our identity, let this be known

urdu transliteration text:
Mai Shaam Chali bhaiyya, Zainab ko sula dena
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am going to Shaam O Brother,
Please pray for me
I wish that this Khake Shifa (sand of Kerbala) become my veil,
